name: Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy
directions: Slice tomato in half and scoop out inside pulp.
Combine tomato pulp with cream cheese and garlic.
Mix with a mixer for several minutes until smooth.
Place mixture in a small bowl and sprinkle with fresh ground pepper.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.

similar.name: Easiest Cheese N' Garlic Dip You'll Ever Find
Pepper Cream Cheese Dip and Spread

name: Spinach & Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
In a blender or food processor, bland the spinach, 1/2 cup of the Parmesan, artichokes, pepper, lemon juice, and mozzarella until well mixed.
Spoon into a lightly oiled casserole dish and top with the remaining 1/4 cup of Parmesan.
Cover and bake for 20 minutes, until hot and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let sit 5 minutes before serving.

similar.name: Crock Pot Artichoke Spinach Dip Low Calorie - Easy
Low-Fat Hot Artichoke and Spinach Dip

name: Shrimp Egg Salad
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Can be used as a sandwich spread, or as a topping for crackers.

name: Crab Spread
directions: Mix well and chill.
Serve with crackers.

name: Salmon Garlic Mayonnaise Salad
directions: Combine all the ingredients except Salmon in a bowl.
Cover and let set to marinate overnight.
About 2 hours before you serve, crumble the Salmon into the bowl.

name: Favorite Easy Clam Dip
directions: Soften cream cheese.
Drain clams (reserve 2 tablespoons of juice) and add 2 tablespoons clam juice to cheese.
Blend until smooth.
Add minced clams, Tabasco sauce, seasonings, onion, and lemon juice.
Mix well.
Chill at least an hour.
Serve with chips or Ritz crackers.
Makes 1 1/3 cups.

similar.name: Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy

name: Chunky Shrimp Dip
directions: Chop shrimp into large, bite size pieces and combine all ingredients.
Chill and serve on crackers.

name: Olive cream cheese spread
directions: dice pimento stuffed olives finely.
combine cream cheese and olives in a bowl.
stir well.
serve on bagels or crackers.

similar.name: Pepper Cream Cheese Dip and Spread

name: Liz's Shrimp Spread
directions: Mix all preceding ingredients and refrigerate for 2 hours.
Spread on or scoop up with Wheat Thins or another cracker.

name: Egg Salad
directions: place ingredients in a bowl, smash together with a fork.
Use more mayonnaise as needed for egg size.
Serve on bread for a sandwich, English muffins for breakfast, or crackers for an appetizer!

name: Hot Enough Tortilla Dip
directions: Blend first 5 ingredients in food processor till well incorporated.
Spoon into serving container and seal well with plastic wrap or aluminum foil.
Refrigerate for one hour or more.
Serve with a dollop of sour cream on top of dip.
(Sour cream helps cut the heat).

similar.name: Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy

name: Smoked Salmon Dip
directions: Put all ingredients in mixing bowl and mix on medium speed until well blended.
Refrigerate.

name: Shrimp Dip
directions: Mix ingredients together.
Let stand overnight in refrigerator.
Serve with crackers.

name: Salmon Pate
directions: Soften cheese.  De-bone salmon.  Combine all ingredients.  Mold into a ball and roll in pecans or sprinkle with parsley.

name: Smoked Salmon Spread
directions: In bowl of a stand mixer, combine cream cheese and cream.
Mix on low speed until smooth.
Beat in dill, lemon juice and pepper.
Fold in salmon.
Sprinkle green onions over top just before serving.
Serve with crackers.
Store spread in a sealable plastic container in refrigerator until ready to pack in a cold cooler.
Best to chill for several hours after making and before serving to allow flavors to blend and to set up.
Preparation time does not include chilling time.

similar.name: Creamy Smoked Salmon & Ancho Chili Spread

name: Shrimp and Crab Crostini
directions: Toast baguette:
Lightly brush each side of slice with oil.
Place in dry skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook on each side until golden brown, about 1-2 minutes.
Remove from heat and place on paper towel.
Spread:
In a bowl, combine 8 oz of shrimp or crab (or a combination of both), red pepper, chives, lime or lemon juice, mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, cheese, & Tabasco (if using) and blend well.
Add kosher salt and black pepper.
Spread mixture on each slice of toasted baguette.
Lay a shrimp that you have cut in 2 lengthwise on each baguette and then add a small parsley leaf and serve.
*Wine recommendation: Sauvignon Blanc.

name: Cold Crab
directions: Combine parsley, onion, mayonnaise, lemon juice, chili sauce and horseradish.
Gently stir in shrimp, then crabmeat.
Chill and serve.

name: Low-Fat Hot Artichoke and Spinach Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 400°F.
Puree tofu, mayonnaise, mustard, lemon juice, garlic and onion powder in blender or food processor until smooth.
Transfer to bowl.
Stir in artichokes, spinach and cheese.
Spoon into 8-inch glass pie dish or casserole.
Bake for 20 minutes.
Dust with paprika before serving.

similar.name: Crock Pot Artichoke Spinach Dip Low Calorie - Easy

name: Shaun's Scrumptious Artichoke Dip
directions: drain artichoke hearts.
blend together with all other ingredients.(or mix by hand for chunkier version).
put in ovenware bowl/crock.
bake for 20-30 minutes at 350 degrees until golden brown on top.
serve with sturdy crackers and a smile.
(I use triscuit crackers).
can be made low fat using low fat cream cheese, low fat mayo, skimmed parmesean cheese).

similar.name: Crock Pot Artichoke/Jalapeno Cheese Dip - Easy

name: Cajun Crab Dip
directions: Mix cream cheese, sour cream, hot sauce, Worcestershire Sauce, Cajun Seasoning, garlic and Italian Seasoning in processor or with electric mixer.
Gently fold in cheddar cheese, onions and crab.
Refrigerate at least 2 hours and adjust seasonings as desired.

name: Lemon-Crab Spread
directions: Finely shred crabmeat or fish
Combine remaining ingredients in medium bowl.
Add crabmeat and mix well.
Chill for at least an hour.

name: Imitation Crab (Surimi) Salad
directions: Mash the eggs.
Flake and cut the surimi.
Mix eggs, surimi, mayonnaise, lemon juice, dill weed, salt and pepper.
Chill.

name: Crab Pate
directions: melt butter in a saucepan large enough to hold all the ingredients.
Stir in the crab meat.
heat gently stirring all together.
beat the egg yolks, cream and sherry together and pour into the crab mixture.
continue to cook and stir until it thickens.
Keep the heat low.
add the cheese until it melts and then take off the heat.
season with Tabasco and lemon juice.
allow to cool
give the mix a final good stir and put into souffle dish or individual ramekin pots and chill for 6 hours or overnight.

name: Cheesy Seafood Spread
directions: Mix everything together except the imitation crab and shredded cheese until it is smooth and well blended.
Fold in the imitation crab meat and shredded cheese.
Chill before serving.
Serve with assorted crackers.

name: Garlicky Sun-Dried Tomato, Smoked Salmon Spread
directions: Place all ingredients in a food processor and pulse until just mixed.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Serve with crackers.

similar.name: Creamy Smoked Salmon & Ancho Chili Spread

name: Baked Spinach & Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
In a medium bowl, combine spinach, artichoke hearts, ½ cup Parmesan cheese, 	mozzarella cheese, white pepper and lemon juice.
Mix well.
Spoon mixture into a 1-quart baking dish.  Top with remaining ¼ cup parmesan cheese.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
Serve with multicolored veggie chips or with restaurant style nacho chips.

similar.name: Crock Pot Artichoke Spinach Dip Low Calorie - Easy
Low-Fat Hot Artichoke and Spinach Dip

name: Chili Cheese Dip
directions: Spread cream cheese on bottom of 9-inch pie plate or quiche dish.
Spread with chili; sprinkle with cheddar cheese.
Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until cheese is melted.
Serve with tortilla chips.
Garnish with tomatoes and green onions if desired.

name: Pepper Cream Cheese Dip and Spread
directions: Heat cream cheese 30-40 sec in microwave. Mix in milk until smooth.
Drain peppers and chop coarsely by pulsing in food processor.
Add cream cheese and pulse until blended.
Serve with crackers, tortilla chips or crudites, or spread on bread or bagels. Can be served immediately or refrigerated overnight to let flavors blend.

similar.name: Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy
Easiest Cheese N' Garlic Dip You'll Ever Find

name: Ruth's Shrimp Dip
directions: Mix cream cheese, Worcestershire, mayo, onion, and garlic salt together.  Spread this mixture to cover the bottom of a pizza pan or round platter.
Spread the cocktail sauce over top of the cream cheese layer.
Remove shrimp from cans and break it up with a fork.  Sprinkle the shredded shrimp over top of the cocktail sauce.
Optional: Sprinkle parsley on top.
Chill until serving time.  Serve with crackers (we like Ritz with this).

name: Awesome Cheese Dip
directions: Place first three ingredients in a pan and heat on low stirring until they are well combined.
Add seasonings and mix well.
Place in covered bowl and refrigerate until cold.
Serve on crackers or garlic toast rounds.  Delicious!

similar.name: Easiest Cheese N' Garlic Dip You'll Ever Find
Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy
Pepper Cream Cheese Dip and Spread

name: Green Salmon Spread
directions: Drain salmon and flake.
Peel avocado; remove pit.
Mash avocado.
Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
Let stand at room temperature for 1 hour for flavors to mix.
Serve with crackers.

similar.name: Creamy Smoked Salmon & Ancho Chili Spread

name: Southwest Cheese Ball- Homemade Gourmet
directions: Mix all ingredients thoroughly and shape into a ball.
Refrigerate 2 hours or longer and serve with chips and/or crackers.
For a festive look and more flavor roll the ball in 3/4 tablespoon of more Southwest Seasoning Mix or crushed pecans.

name: Hot Artichoke Dip
directions: Mix the whole thing together and put in a casserole dish.
Bake at 350F for 30 minutes or until the edges are browned and the middle is bubbly.
Serve with sliced bagels, pita bread, or anything else you'd like.
I don't recommend salted crackers, however, as the dip is salty enough.

similar.name: Crock Pot Artichoke/Jalapeno Cheese Dip - Easy

name: No-Brainer Shrimp Spread
directions: Mix together softened cream cheese, 2/3 of shrimp, sliced onions and 1/2 bottle of shrimp cocktail sauce.
Mix well, adding more cocktail sauce if necessary to make mixture a spreading consistency.
Put in a serving bowl, put a thin layer of cocktail sauce over spread to cover top, then arrange remaining shrimp over that to decorate the appetizer.
Chill, then serve with crackers of your choice.

name: Elias Inn Crab Spread
directions: Mix all ingredients except crackers until well blended.

name: Shrimp Pizza Dip
directions: Mix together the cream cheese, lemon juice, minced onion, mayonnaise, Worcestershire sauce and garlic powder.
Spread mixture on round pizza pan (or cookie sheet).
Top with cocktail sauce, then shrimp, then cheese, then parsley flakes.
Serve with crackers.

name: Holiday Dried Beef Cheese Ball
directions: keep cheese out to soften, cut up green onion in small pieces and wash well, cut up beef in small pieces.
Mix all in a bowl and then shape into ball or other shape.
cover with foil and  refrigerate for 1 hr or 2 before serving with crackers.

similar.name: Dried Beef / Chipped Beef Cheese Ball

name: Spicy Smoked Salmon Dip
directions: Chop salmon into fine pieces.
Blend all ingredients into large bowl.
Chill for 1-2 hours.
Serve topped on crackers or toast and enjoy!

similar.name: Creamy Smoked Salmon & Ancho Chili Spread

name: Hot Crab and Cheese Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients in no special order - except to make sure you whip the cream cheese slightly.
Pour into a well greased oven safe bowl and bake for 30 mins or until the cheese bubbles up.
Serve with crustinies* or warm bread.

*Crustinies are simple slices of your favorite Italian bread (1/4" or less cut on an angle) rubbed with a raw clove of garlic (cut the clove in half and simply rub over each slice of bread) a drizzle of olive oil and a dash of parmesan on each slice. Bake at 325°F till golden brown.

name: Dr Pepper Cheese Ball
directions: Place cheeses in large bowl of electric mixer; mix until blended.
Add Dr. Pepper and mix until light and fluffy.
Add remaining ingredients and mix until blended.
Shape into 2 balls and chill for 20 minutes.
Place in a plastic bag and chill thoroughly, then serve with crackers.

name: Jalapeno Popper Dip
directions: Stir together cream cheese and mayonnaise in a large bowl until smooth. Stir in green chiles and jalapeno peppers.
Pour mixture into a microwave safe serving dish, and sprinkle with cheddar cheese and bread crumbs.
Spray a couple of sprays of PAM oil spray to help with crispness.
Microwave on High until hot, about 3 minutes.
NOTE: Can also be baked in the oven at 375 degrees for 30 minutes.

similar.name: Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy

name: Creamy Salsa Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a bowl.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours to allow vegetables to rehydrate.

similar.name: Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy

name: Taco Spread
directions: Let cream cheese reach room temperature.
Mix cream cheese, sour cream and taco seasoning well.
Spread into casserole dish.
Layer toppings in this order, lettuce, cheese, tomatoes, onion, and hot peppers (optional).
Serve with tortilla chips.

similar.name: Creamy Smoked Salmon & Ancho Chili Spread

name: Horseradish Shrimp Spread
directions: Cream together cream cheese and butter.
Add remaining ingredients.
Can be molded and frozen.
Note:  Time does not include time in refrigerater to marry ingredients together.

name: Fake Crab Dip
directions: soften cream cheese; mix in crab and onion.
Put in shallow serving bowl.
Cover and chill until ready to serve!
Easy as can be.

name: Cheese Spread With Olives
directions: In large bowl, combine cheese, herbs, sherry and butter; beat until smooth.
Spoon into serving bowl or mold; cover and refrigerate several hours to blend flavors.
Serve with olives and crackers.

similar.name: Easiest Cheese N' Garlic Dip You'll Ever Find
Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy

name: Crab Salad
directions: Combine all ingredients and chill before serving.
Serve with celery sticks, or on rolls or crackers.

name: Mexican Taco Dip
directions: Mix cream cheese and picante sauce together and spread on bottom of 9x13 pan.
Place lettuce, green peppers, tomatoes and onions on top in layers.
Sprinkle with cheddar cheese.
Serve with tortilla chips.

name: Dried Beef / Chipped Beef Cheese Ball
directions: Dice the dried beef into small pieces. This is dependent upon how small you want your dried beef to be. I usually dice mine into 1/4" squares (approx.), but others like it more finely diced.
Dice/mince the green onions.

Add all of the ingredients to the softened cream cheese in a medium sized bowl. Stir. (I usually use my clean hands for this; a wooden spoon also works with a bit more effort). The ingredients should be consistent throughout the cheese ball.
Wrap in plastic wrap. Store in the fridge for at least 6-8 hours. This is one of those recipes that is at its best after sitting overnight. This way, the flavors really blend.
Serve with crackers. My family likes Wheat Thins, but it really goes with any type of cracker. Enjoy!

name: Cheese Ball
directions: Put all ingredients in a large bowl, wash your hands and mix away. Smooth into a ball and put on a pretty plate and serve with crackers. (We like ritz, chicken in a biscuit and Triscuits the best).

name: Crock Pot Artichoke/Jalapeno Cheese Dip - Easy
directions: Dice jalapeno and artichokes.
Put jalapeno, artichoke, mozzarella, mustard, milk, Worcestershire, soup, Velveeta in crock pot and mix.
Cook on low in crock pot for 2-3 hours and serve with some chips.

similar.name: Crock Pot Artichoke Spinach Dip Low Calorie - Easy

name: Crock Pot Artichoke Spinach Dip Low Calorie - Easy
directions: Drain all the liquid from the spinach.
In blender or mixer put spinach, parmesan, cream cheese, garlic, pepper, horseradish, artichokes, smoke, and hot sauce.  Pulse to chunky or smoother depending on your taste.
Put mixture into crock pot and mix in the mozzarella.
Usually takes about 2-3 hours.

similar.name: Low-Fat Hot Artichoke and Spinach Dip
Crock Pot Artichoke/Jalapeno Cheese Dip - Easy

name: Schneider Family Cheese Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients until creamy and smooth.
Chill.
Serve with potato chips, corn chips or pretzels.

similar.name: Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy
Pepper Cream Cheese Dip and Spread

name: Baked Artichoke Dip
directions: In a large bowl, combine the chopped artichoke hearts, Parmesan cheese, mayonnaise, lemon juice, garlic salt, and pepper. Spoon the mixture into a baking dish suitable for serving.
Bake at 375°F for about 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown. Serve warm with sliced pita bread or whole-wheat crackers.

similar.name: Crock Pot Artichoke/Jalapeno Cheese Dip - Easy

name: Salmon Spread
directions: Mix together cream cheese and sour cream till smooth
Add horseradish, lemon juice and Daddy Hinkles; mix well.
Then add onions and dill mix well again
Finally add the salmon
Mix everything till well blended.
Serve right a way as a dip or refrigerate and use as a spread.  I hope you all enjoy this--know the guest at the 23rd Street Dillons do lol.
Oh yeah, I serve this on crackers--usually just Ritz at work,  but it is so good on the new Keebler cornbread crackers--yum!

name: Zippy Shrimp Dip
directions: Mix well with electric mixer and store in refrigerator several hours before serving. Sprinkle paprika or Morton's Hot Salt over top for color. Garnish with fresh parsley sprig.
Cooking time is actually chilling time.

name: Fireside Shrimp Dip
directions: Hand grate the cheese. Use a medium-sized grate so you have some nice-sized shreds.
Dice onion, whatever size you like.
Rinse and drain shrimp. (can also use frozen cooked shrimp diced up about 1/2lb, I do).
Add the shrimp and onion to the cheese along with the mayonnaise and the Worcestershire sauce. Stir until blended.
Find a decorative bowl to serve this in as it's pretty plain looking otherwise.
Set out a spreader or spoon so guests can mound the dip on a cracker.

name: Creamy Spinach Dip
directions: Add all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.
If you are vegan, substitute the regular sour cream for sour cream substitute.

similar.name: Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy

name: Cream Cheese Olive Dip
directions: Put all ingredients in mixer bowl.
Mix ingredients on medium speed until well blended.
Whip on high speed for 10-15 seconds.
Serve chilled.

similar.name: Easiest Cheese N' Garlic Dip You'll Ever Find
Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy

name: Rodney's Shrimp Dip
directions: Mix;   chill;   serve.
Tah-dah.

name: Cold Crab Dip
directions: Combine cream cheese and lemon juice in mixer.  Add mayonnaise and blend well.(when adding the mayo do so by hand).
Add green onion, Worcestershire sauce, pepper, salt, paprika onion powder and crab meat. Mix well.
Serve with crackers or chips.

name: Smoked Salmon Cracker Spread
directions: in small bowl beat cream cheese at medium speed, scraping bowl often until light and fluffy.
add salt, lemon juice, onion, liquid smoke and horseradish.  continue beating until well mixed.
by hand stir in salmon.
spoon into serving bowl.  if desired garnish with peacans and parsley.
serve with crakers, store refrigerated.

similar.name: Creamy Smoked Salmon & Ancho Chili Spread

name: Smoked Salmon Pate
directions: Process salmon in food processor till almost smooth.
Transfer to a bowl.
Add all other ingredients.
Stir gently till combined.
Season if need be.
Place into serving bowl, smooth top.
Cover with plastic wrap.
Refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
Serve with melba toast.

similar.name: Creamy Smoked Salmon & Ancho Chili Spread

name: Hyman's Charleson Crab Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Form into a ball or portion sizes that you like.
Chill until firm.
Serve with crackers or veggies for scooping.

name: Easy Cheese Ball
directions: Mix all ingrediants together except chopped nuts.  Scrape mixture from bowl onto a sheet of plastic wrap and bring sides together to seal.  Using your hands, shape mixture into a ball and refrigerate until firm.  Remove plastic wrap and roll cheese ball in enough chopped nuts to completely coat.  Place cheese ball onto plate, surround with good quality firm fruit and crackers and enjoy!

name: Cheese Ball Dip
directions: Leave cream cheese out to soften to room temperature.
Meanwhile chop the green onions stems or sprigs into very thin slices (smaller than a dime in thickness).
And dice wafer thin ham into small pieces like onion.
Mix together cream cheese, accent, green onion and 1/2 the diced ham. Once thoroughly combined evenly, form mixture into a ball shape with your hands.
Then roll ball into remaining half of diced ham.
I usually make this ahead and refrigerate with wax paper or plastic wrap over it until serving time.
Center on serving dish and surround with "Sociable" crackers.

NOTE: For servings I guessed at 8-10 but everyone loves it and eats more than they should so I sometimes make a double recipe depending on what other appetizers I'm making for the holiday and how many are coming.

similar.name: Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy

name: Shrimp Spread
directions: Combine thoroughly all ingredients except shrimp.
Fold in shrimp.
Cover and chill to blend flavours.

name: Savory Cheeseball
directions: Place cream cheese in bowl and let soften just a bit.  Add finely chopped pastrami and green onions, including about half of the chive.  Add Accent and Worcestershire sauce and (this part is a bit messy) knead mixture thoroughly with clean hands.  Form into a ball and chill before serving with crackers.

similar.name: Dried Beef / Chipped Beef Cheese Ball

name: Shrimp Spread
directions: Combine cream cheese and salad dressing, mixing until well blended.
Stir in remaining ingredients.
Cover and chill.
Serve with assorted crackers.

name: Easiest Cheese N' Garlic Dip You'll Ever Find
directions: Peel garlic and place in boiling water (don't dice it!), don't bother to time, when you are done with the next steps it will be ready.
Place cream cheese in bowl and microwave 30 seconds.
Add olive oil and pepper (I like it with lots of pepper, you can also trade that for other spicy condiments).
Take the garlic out of the water and place in a flat surface, a board will do, then CRUSH with a fork.
Add garlic to the mix.
Serve and enjoy ;).

similar.name: Cream Cheese Dip for the Lazy
Pepper Cream Cheese Dip and Spread

name: Yooper Smoked Fish Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients to desired consistency.
Chill and enjoy.

name: Southwestern Taco Dip
directions: Cook ground hamburger on stove then set aside to cool.
Mix 2 cream cheese & sour cream together, add taco seasoning to mix.
Spread refried beans on bottom of a 9x13 baking dish.
Spread cheese mix over beans.
Layer hamburger over the cheese mix.
Spread salsa over hamburger then shredded cheddar cheese and shredded lettuce.
Serve with tortillia chips. Keep Refrigerated.

name: Chunky Fresh Spinach Dip
directions: Cut spinach leaves into 1" wide strips, place in microwave on high power for approx 1 minute to wilt leaves slightly.  Drain very well on paper towels, squeezing as much water out as possible.
Cut water chestnuts into small chunks (don't mince, about 1/4" pieces, I use a manual food chopper).
Mix all ingredients in medium size bowl.  Refrigerate several hours to blend flavor.  Dip is better made the day before and left to set overnight.  If this is done, stir well before serving.

name: Auntie's Salmon Dip
directions: 1.  Blend all the ingredients in a food processor for 1 minute.

name: Beefy Cheese Ball
directions: In a bowl, combine first four ingredients and mix well.  Shape into a ball, then place on a serving dish.  Serve with assorted crackers.

similar.name: Dried Beef / Chipped Beef Cheese Ball

name: Crab Dip Appetizer
directions: Let cream cheese soften.
Add horseradish and red hot sauce to cream cheese. Blend well.
Next you can either blend crab flakes into cream cheese and serve or spread flakes over top of dip after dip is spread on flat pan (pizza pan) and serve with crackers.

name: Cream Cheese-Cheese Ball
directions: 1. Let cream cheese soften slightly so ingredients will mix well.
2. Add all ingredients to the cream cheese and mix well.
3. Form a ball with the cream cheese mixture.
4. Cover and refrigerate until it firms.  (Usually only takes about 10 mins).
5. Cover the cheese ball with the chopped nuts.
Serve with crackers, pita chips or toast points.

name: Creamy Smoked Salmon & Ancho Chili Spread
directions: Mix together cream cheese, Greek yogurt, cracked pepper and red bell pepper & ancho chili jam until thoroughly combined. Gently fold in smoked salmon. Spoon a small amount of salmon cream cheese mixture on crackers. Sprinkle with chives and serve.

similar.name: Garlicky Sun-Dried Tomato, Smoked Salmon Spread
